varieties.name: 1. Minowase Summer Cross No. 3
varieties.flesh_fruit: Pure white, crisp, mild, sweet, and juicy
varieties.availability: Johnny's Selected Seeds (ships to Australia), Gowan Seed, Territorial Seed

varieties.name: 2. April Cross
varieties.flesh_fruit: Smooth, pure white, crisp, mild with subtle sweetness
varieties.yield_notes: High, uniform production. 60 days to maturity
varieties.availability: Stokes Seeds, Veseys Seeds, American Takii, Harris Seeds, Jung Seeds (international shipping)

varieties.name: 3. Minowase (Japanese Minowase)
varieties.origin: Japan (ancient heirloom, one of five foundation strains for modern Japanese hybrids)
varieties.traits: Long white cylindrical roots up to 60cm (24") × 7-10cm (3-4") diameter. Can weigh 1-2kg
varieties.flesh_fruit: Pure white, crisp, dense, juicy. Sweet when young, more pungent when mature
varieties.yield_notes: Very high. 45-60 days to maturity. Can grow 0.5-1kg average

varieties.name: 4. Tokinashi All-Season
varieties.origin: Japan (traditional vegetable/dento yasai, Fukuoka wild-sown variety)
varieties.traits: Long white roots 38-45cm (15-18") long, firm and crisp
varieties.flesh_fruit: Firm, white, crisp with strong pungency and nice flavor
varieties.yield_notes: Good productivity. Notably slow to bolt, does not become pithy
varieties.availability: Box Garden Seeds LLC, Eden Seeds (Lower Beechmont, QLD 4211 - LOCAL Brisbane supplier)

varieties.name: 5. White Miyashige (White Neck Miyashige)
varieties.flesh_fruit: Mild, crunchy, sweet. Excellent for pickling and kimchi
varieties.availability: West Coast Seeds, Diggers Club (Australia - Heronswood/St Erth gardens)

varieties.name: 6. Long White Chinese / Chinese White
varieties.flesh_fruit: White skin and crisp white flesh, sweet and mild flavor

varieties.name: 7. Daikon (Standard/Generic)
varieties.flesh_fruit: Crisp, white, mildly pungent, versatile

varieties.name: 8. Watermelon Radish (Beauty Heart, Shinrimei, Red Meat)
varieties.traits: Round, 5-10cm diameter. Dull green/white exterior, bright rose-pink interior
varieties.flesh_fruit: Crisp, sweet and spicy, beautiful pink flesh
varieties.yield_notes: Moderate. 30-80 days maturity depending on size
varieties.availability: True Leaf Market, Seed Needs, RareSeeds.com, Australian heirloom suppliers

varieties.name: 9. Sakurajima Daikon
varieties.origin: Sakurajima Island, Kagoshima, Japan (200+ year old variety, volcanic ash soil)
varieties.traits: Giant round/basketball-shaped white radish. Average 4.5-6kg (10-13 lb), can reach 30kg+ (68+ lb). World record: 31.1kg. Diameter 18-20"
varieties.flesh_fruit: White, crisp, sweet, firm, low fiber. Sweeter and firmer than other daikons
varieties.yield_notes: Massive individual roots but requires significant growing space and time

varieties.name: 10. China Rose / Chinese Rose Winter
varieties.origin: China (documented 1548, brought from China ~1845, mentioned in Vilmorin-Andrieux 1885)
varieties.flesh_fruit: White, crisp, firm, compact, slightly spicy, aromatic

varieties.name: 11. Korean Radish (Mu, Joseon Mu)
varieties.origin: Korea (traditional since Three Kingdoms era 57 BCE-668 CE)
varieties.traits: Short, stout, rotund cylindrical. 15-20cm long × 7-8cm diameter, ~800g weight. White base with pale green shoulders
varieties.flesh_fruit: Dense, crisp, crunchy, semi-aqueous. Mild, peppery, subtly sweet when raw

varieties.name: 12. Black Spanish Long
varieties.origin: Spain (arrived with First Fleet to Australia, pre-1788)
varieties.flesh_fruit: White interior, pungent flavor

varieties.name: 13. Black Spanish Round
varieties.flesh_fruit: Crispy white solid flesh

varieties.name: 14. Icicle / White Icicle
varieties.traits: White tapered roots to 12-15cm, narrow carrot-like
varieties.flesh_fruit: White, tender, mild flavor

varieties.name: [INDIGENOUS TO INDIA/SOUTH ASIA]
varieties.origin: India (traditional cultivation for centuries, indigenous to South Asia)
varieties.traits: Long white cylindrical roots, similar to Chinese/Japanese daikon but heat-adapted. Variable sizes 15-40cm
varieties.flesh_fruit: High water content, white, crisp when fresh, can be firm or softer depending on variety
varieties.yield_notes: Good productivity in tropical conditions when sown at right time

varieties.name: [INDIGENOUS TO INDIA/SOUTH ASIA]
varieties.origin: South India (regional variant, traditional in Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Karnataka)
varieties.traits: White radish similar to mooli, adapted to South Indian tropical climate
varieties.flesh_fruit: White, becomes soft and sweet when cooked, releases strong odor when cooking
varieties.availability: Kerala local markets, Tamil Nadu seed suppliers, South Indian agricultural sources

varieties.name: 3. Chinese White / Lo Bok
varieties.traits: Cylindrical white roots, similar to Japanese daikon but heat-adapted
varieties.flesh_fruit: White, crisp, mild sweet flavor

varieties.name: 4. Minowase Summer Cross No. 3
varieties.flesh_fruit: White, mild, sweet, juicy

varieties.name: 5. April Cross
varieties.flesh_fruit: White, crisp, mild, sweet

varieties.name: 6. Minowase (Japanese Minowase)
varieties.traits: Long white roots up to 60cm, can weigh 1-2kg
varieties.flesh_fruit: White, crisp, dense, sweet when young
varieties.availability: Heirloom seed companies with international shipping

varieties.name: 7. Watermelon Radish
varieties.flesh_fruit: Crisp, sweet, spicy, pink
varieties.availability: Specialty seed importers, international heirloom companies

varieties.name: 8. China Rose Winter Radish
varieties.flesh_fruit: White, crisp, firm, slightly spicy

varieties.name: 9. Korean Radish (Mu)
varieties.traits: Short stout, 15-20cm, white with green shoulders
varieties.flesh_fruit: Dense, crisp, peppery, sweet
varieties.availability: Korean specialty suppliers, limited in India

varieties.name: 10. Tokinashi All-Season
varieties.flesh_fruit: White, crisp, strong pungency

varieties.name: 11. Long White Icicle
varieties.flesh_fruit: Tender, mild
varieties.availability: International seed companies, some Indian suppliers

varieties.name: 12. Standard Daikon (Heat-Tolerant Selections)
varieties.flesh_fruit: White, crisp, variable pungency
